name: Very Best Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Butter and flour a 10-inch Bundt pan.
2. In a large bowl, sift together cocoa powder, flour, baking powder, salt, and instant espresso. Set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, cream butter until light and fluffy. Add sugar and beat until dissolved, about 5 minutes on high speed.
4. Reduce speed to medium-low and add vanilla extract.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each one is incorporated.
6. Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
7. Pour batter into prepared Bundt pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cake to cool in the pan on a rack for 20 minutes.
10. Turn cake onto a serving platter and let it cool completely before glazing.
11. For the chocolate glaze, bring corn syrup to a boil in a quart-sized saucepan over high heat. Remove from heat and add chopped bittersweet chocolate. Stir with a whisk or spatula until smooth, shiny, and cooled before drizzling over the cake. Do not make substitutions!
